name: layoutlint
description: Deterministic UI layout checks and screenshots for JSX/HTML + Tailwind — overflow, overlap, viewport fit, text truncation, SVG/PNG render — in milliseconds, no browser. Validated against headless-Chromium golden files.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts src/cli.ts src/mcp.ts --outdir dist --target node --splitting --external fontkit --external harfbuzzjs --external htmlparser2 --external domhandler --external yoga-layout --external zod --external '@resvg/resvg-js' --external '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/*' && bunx dts-bundle-generator --project ../../tsconfig.json --external-inlines @layoutlint/core -o dist/index.d.ts src/index.ts
